source_article: The Rod & The Cast (Lovoll & Borger); data/sexyloops.com/rodcast.shtml
note: Event frames from the Cast #1 forward stroke, taken from the user's 400-frame PNG dump (data/cast1_frames, ~500 fps capture, burned-in clock). RSP = frame 0317 (rod straight, loop nose forming, clock ~00:63 = 0.63 s), identified by the user and set to t=0. The other events use the article's exact inter-event timing (Table 1, EVENTS) converted to frames at 500 fps: t=(frame-317)/500. All four events fall in frames 243-346, i.e. within the first ~0.69 s of real time -- which is within the first 12 s at 30 fps playback (frame 346 -> ~11.5 s). Frames are grayscale, downscaled and labelled.
